name: Crescent Cheese Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread one package of crescent rolls on the bottom of an ungreased 9 x 13-inch pan.
2. Cream together the cream cheese, sugar, egg, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the first layer of crescent rolls.
4. Place the second package of crescent rolls on top of the cheese mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining sugar, cinnamon, and chopped nuts (if using) to create the topping.
6. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the layered crescent rolls.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
